jcu-townsville.name: James Cook University
jcu-townsville.student_quote: Studying Marine Biology here at JCU is unreal! You literally get to do research on the Great Barrier Reef, and the community is super supportive and close-knit.

griffith-gold-coast.name: Griffith University Gold Coast
griffith-gold-coast.student_quote: Studying here is like balancing on a surfboard—there's always something happening, whether it's on the beach or with the latest tech startup. It's the perfect mix of work and play.

uq-brisbane.name: University of Queensland
uq-brisbane.student_quote: Walking through the Great Court feels like stepping into a historical movie set, but the real action is all the late-night brainstorming sessions at the lakeside. UQ is where you'll find your tribe, no matter your passion.

unimelb.name: University of Melbourne
unimelb.student_quote: Studying here is like being at the heart of Melbourne's culture, with a mix of intense academia and a vibrant social scene. I love grabbing a coffee in a laneway before diving into research.

unsw-sydney.name: UNSW Sydney
unsw-sydney.student_quote: UNSW is like a melting pot of cultures and ideas, with so many opportunities to connect with industry right at our doorstep. Plus, being just a quick bus ride from the beach is a total game-changer.
